title: Basic JavaScript Image Editor
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Image Editor. Focus on implementing Canvas image loading correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Image Editor
description: Create a function that uses Canvas image loading and Image filters (brightness, contrast, sepia) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Image Editor Project
description: Build a small application that applies Canvas image loading, Image filters (brightness, contrast, sepia), Drawing tools (brush, eraser, shapes) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Image Editor
description: The following code has bugs related to Canvas image loading. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Image Editor
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Canvas image loading and Image filters (brightness, contrast, sepia).
